home.heroBadge: Regulated by the Ethiopian Capital Market Authority
home.heroSubtitle: Securely browse stock listings and connect with verified institutional brokers. Professional mediation for the modern investor.
home.feature1Body: Direct access to ECMA-licensed professionals, ensuring every transaction is handled with institutional integrity.
home.feature2Body: Real-time request tracking and secure document exchange without the unnecessary complexity of day-trading terminals.
home.feature3Body: Clear, detailed listings for CBE, Ethio Telecom, and emerging enterprises. Information parity for all investors.
home.processSubtitle: Our platform streamlines the connection between investors and licensed financial intermediaries.
home.processStep1Body: Browse available stock opportunities with full company disclosures and indicative pricing.
home.processStep2Body: Express interest through our secure platform to be assigned a verified institutional intermediary.
home.processStep3Body: Discuss specific terms, finalize documentation, and execute through your chosen broker safely.
home.featuredSubtitle: Direct institutional listings from Ethiopia's largest enterprises.
home.listing1Body: The leading bank in Ethiopia, offering a historic opportunity for private shareholding.
home.listing2Body: East Africa's telecommunications giant entering its next phase of public expansion.
home.ctaBannerSubtitle: Join ETStockX to access professional market coordination and secure your place in Ethiopia's growing financial landscape.
home.footerLegal: © {year} ETStockX. Licensed by the Ethiopian Capital Market Authority. All investments involve risk. Broker services are provided by independent licensed institutions.
home.brokersPageIntro: Verified institutional intermediaries on the platform.

auth.loginSubtitle: Welcome back. Enter your credentials to access your portal.
auth.loginInvalidCredentials: Invalid credentials. Please check your email or password and try again.
auth.loginFooterCopyright: © {year} ETStockX. Licensed by the Ethiopian Capital Market Authority.
auth.loginAsideValue1Body: Access a curated network of licensed brokerage firms regulated by the ECMA.
auth.loginAsideValue2Body: Monitor every step of your submission with real-time status updates and direct messaging.
auth.loginAsideValue3Body: Explore official listings with transparent data to make informed investment decisions.
auth.loginSocialProof: Trusted by thousands of Ethiopian investors
auth.registerFormSubheading: Choose your role to get started with secure onboarding.
auth.registerValue1Body: Every broker is rigorously vetted for compliance and reliability.
auth.registerValue2Body: Real-time status updates on all your investment queries.
auth.registerValue3Body: Explore localized listings with unmatched transparency.
auth.roleInvestorDesc: A client can act as an investor, or seller depending on their onboarding and account status.
auth.roleSellerDesc: Manage sell-side requests and profile details.
auth.fullNameBilingualLabel: Full Name / Organization Name (Amharic: ሙሉ ስም)
auth.passwordRulesHint: At least 8 characters, including an uppercase letter, a lowercase letter, a number, and a special character (!@#$ etc.).
auth.fullNameTooLong: Full name must be at most 255 characters.
auth.licenseRequired: License number is required for broker and dealer accounts.
auth.termsRequired: Please accept the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
auth.registerSuccess: Check your email to verify your account.
auth.verifyPageSubtitle: We've sent a 6-digit verification code to {email}. Enter it below to secure your account.
auth.verifyResendSuccess: A new code has been sent.
auth.verifyInvalidCode: Invalid verification code. Please try again.
auth.verifyMissingEmail: We couldn't find your email. Register or open the link from your inbox.
auth.verifyAsideValue1Body: Direct access to certified Ethiopian market professionals.
auth.verifyAsideValue2Body: Real-time updates on your stock purchase and sale requests.
auth.verifyAsideValue3Body: Professional insights and transparent listing explorers.
auth.verifyAsideFooter: © {year} ETStockX. Licensed by ECMA. All rights reserved.
auth.verifySuccess: Your email is verified. You can sign in.
auth.forgotPasswordSubtitle: Enter your email address below and we'll send you instructions to reset your password.
auth.forgotPasswordSuccess: Password reset link sent! Check your inbox for instructions.
auth.forgotPasswordInvalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
auth.forgotAsideValue2Body: Real-time updates on your stock purchase and sale requests.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.notActivated: Complete your profile to unlock trading actions.
dashboard.stubTrade: Trading workspace will appear when the Trade module is available.
dashboard.stubMarket: Listings and search will appear when the Market module is available.

profile.completeHint: All fields are required to activate investor status.
